name: MEDALLION FINANCIAL CORP
summary: Medallion Financial Corp. is a Delaware-incorporated specialty finance company operating through subsidiaries including Medallion Bank (FDIC-insured industrial bank). It originates consumer loans for recreational vehicles, boats, collector cars, and home improvements, as well as commercial subordinated loans to lower middle market businesses. It also provides loan origination services to fintech strategic partners and historically originated taxi medallion loans. Total assets were $2.96 billion as of December 31, 2025.

products.name: Recreation Loans
products.description: Fixed-rate consumer loans for RVs, boats, collector cars, and other recreational equipment; 63% of loans receivable as of Dec 31, 2025.

products.name: Home Improvement Loans
products.description: Fixed-rate installment loans for window, siding, roof replacement, swimming pools, and other home improvement projects; 32% of loans receivable.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Subordinated loans of $2.5M-$6.0M to U.S. lower middle market businesses for acquisitions, recapitalizations, and growth; 5% of loans receivable.

products.name: Strategic Partnership Loan Origination
products.description: Loan origination and sale services for fintech partners; originated $771.6M in 2025, loans sold without recourse within specified timeframe.

products.name: Taxi Medallion Loans
products.description: Historically originated taxi medallion loans in NYC metro area; now less than 0.2% of assets as of Dec 31, 2025.

products.name: Mezzanine Financing (Medallion Capital)
products.description: SBIC-operated mezzanine financing business for small to mid-size businesses.

partnerships.description: Strategic partnership program launched in 2019 to originate and sell loans facilitated by fintech partners; $771.6M originated in 2025.
